objective: Audit and refresh stale docs/wiki markdown files
background: 5 markdown files in docs/ or wiki/ have not been updated in > 30 days. They may reference outdated APIs, file paths, or procedures.
constraints: Do not delete documents without archiving to archive/
Do not modify trading thresholds or strategy parameters
Do not require live broker connection
acceptance_tests: Each stale file reviewed and updated or marked as archived
File paths and API references verified against current codebase
CHANGELOG.md updated with a doc-refresh entry
No dead links remaining in docs/ or wiki/
required_outputs: Each stale file reviewed and updated or marked as archived
File paths and API references verified against current codebase
CHANGELOG.md updated with a doc-refresh entry
No dead links remaining in docs/ or wiki/
forbidden_changes: Do not delete documents without archiving to archive/
handoff_questions: Did you verify each acceptance criterion with evidence?
